name: Dual Consciousness Mode (Iterative Refinement)
description: AI-driven memory routing with search interpretation and iterative quality feedback loops. Search interpreter validates memory relevance. Quality scorer enables refinement loops.

schema.name: User Input

outputs.name: inputSource
outputs.description: Input source: text, speech, or chat

schema.description: Unified input node for text and speech

schema.name: Session Context
schema.description: Loads session and conversation history

schema.name: System Settings
schema.description: Provides system configuration

schema.name: Intent Orchestrator

outputs.name: needsAction
outputs.description: Routes to Big Brother when true

schema.description: Enhanced intent analysis with action detection and conversation awareness (NO HARDCODING - LLM interprets intent)

schema.name: Smart Router
schema.description: Routes queries based on complexity analysis

schema.name: Memory Router
schema.description: AI-driven memory routing using orchestrator hints

schema.name: Conversation History
schema.description: Loads conversation history

schema.name: Context Builder

inputs.name: feedbackContext
inputs.description: Feedback from previous iteration (quality issues, suggestions)

outputs.name: unknownSignal
outputs.description: Pass-through of unknownSignal from search interpretation

outputs.name: persona
outputs.description: Passthrough persona for downstream nodes (Quality Scorer)

schema.description: Builds context package with memories and persona

schema.name: Response Synthesizer

inputs.name: personaText
inputs.description: Formatted persona text for voice synthesis

schema.description: Synthesizes final response using persona context

schema.name: Chain-of-Thought Stripper
schema.description: Removes internal reasoning blocks

schema.name: Safety Validator
schema.description: Validates response safety

schema.name: Response Refiner
schema.description: Refines response to address safety issues

schema.name: Memory Capture
schema.description: Saves conversation to episodic memory

schema.name: Audit Logger
schema.description: Logs to audit trail

schema.name: Stream Writer
schema.description: Streams response to client

schema.name: Persona Loader
schema.description: Loads persona core configuration

schema.name: Persona Formatter
schema.description: Formats persona data into system prompt text

schema.name: Buffer Manager
schema.description: Persists conversation buffer to disk

schema.name: Thinking Stripper

inputs.name: response
inputs.description: LLM response that may contain <think> blocks

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: Response with thinking stripped (alias for stripped)

schema.description: Extracts <think> blocks for UI display, provides stripped content for memory/TTS

schema.name: Search Interpreter

outputs.name: relevantMemories
outputs.description: Filtered relevant memories with relevance scores

outputs.name: hasRelevantResults
outputs.description: Whether any relevant results were found

outputs.name: unknownSignal
outputs.description: True if the system should respond "I don't know"

outputs.name: interpretation
outputs.description: Summary of what was found or not found

outputs.name: rejectedCount
outputs.description: Number of memories rejected as irrelevant

outputs.name: fullResult
outputs.description: Complete result object for Context Builder

schema.description: Evaluates search results for relevance and signals "I don't know" when appropriate

schema.name: Quality Scorer

inputs.name: persona
inputs.description: Persona data (values, personality, identity) for alignment check

outputs.name: passesThreshold
outputs.description: Whether response aligns with persona values

outputs.name: suggestions
outputs.description: How to better align with persona

schema.description: Evaluates response against persona VALUES - not generic quality. Checks values alignment, privacy, and character consistency.

schema.name: Feedback Router

outputs.name: response
outputs.description: Response to output (may be modified on failure)

outputs.name: shouldContinueLoop
outputs.description: True if routing back to orchestrator

schema.description: Routes responses based on quality/safety, enabling iterative refinement loops

schema.name: Gateway

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Data to pass through when gate is open

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Gate condition - true opens gate, false closes it

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: Data passed through (null if gate closed)

outputs.name: passed
outputs.description: Whether data passed through the gate

invertCondition.label: Invert Condition
invertCondition.description: When true, gate opens when condition is false

schema.description: Conditional pass-through gate - data only flows when condition is true (like a transistor)

schema.name: Graph Note
schema.description: Documentation node for explaining graph workflows

properties.title: Dual Consciousness Mode v3.0 - Iterative Refinement Graph
properties.content:
PURPOSE: This graph implements iterative refinement with feedback loops to prevent hallucinations and ensure quality responses.

FLOW OVERVIEW:
1. User Input → Orchestrator LLM (analyzes intent, determines routing)
2. Memory Router → Search Interpreter (evaluates relevance, signals 'unknownSignal' if no relevant memories)
3. Context Builder (combines memories + unknownSignal into context package)
4. Response Synthesizer (generates response using persona + context)
5. Quality Scorer (evaluates response quality, detects hallucinations)
6. Safety Validator (checks for policy violations)
7. Feedback Router (CRITICAL: decides output vs loop back)
   - If quality/safety PASS → routes to Gateway (gate opens)
   - If FAIL → routes feedbackContext back to Orchestrator (gate stays closed)
8. Gateway (OUTPUT GATE) - Acts like a transistor:
   - Gate OPEN (shouldContinueLoop=false) → data flows to Stream Writer
   - Gate CLOSED (shouldContinueLoop=true) → data blocked during iteration
9. Max 3 iterations to prevent infinite loops

KEY INNOVATION: Gateway Node
- Prevents output nodes from running during loop iterations
- Only passes data when loop exits (invertCondition=true on shouldContinueLoop)
- No hidden executor logic - transparent graph-based control flow

BACK-EDGE: Feedback Router → Orchestrator for iterative refinement.

NODE IDS:
- 1: User Input | 24: Orchestrator | 6: Memory Router | 32: Search Interpreter
- 8: Context Builder | 17: Response Synthesizer | 33: Quality Scorer
- 19: Safety Validator | 20: Response Refiner | 34: Feedback Router
- 35: Gateway (Output Gate) | 23: Stream Writer | 31: Thinking Stripper | 21: Memory Capture

schema.name: Text Input
schema.description: Gateway to chat interface text input

properties.message:
im just running some checks - sorry about the redundancy
how are you?

schema.name: Chat View
schema.description: Displays chat messages visually

schema.name: Output Viewer
schema.description: Debug node that displays raw output data and accumulates history across loop iterations

data.comment: User message → Orchestrator
System settings → Orchestrator slot 2 (permission context)
Conversation History → Orchestrator slot 1 (context awareness for response length/style)
Orchestrator analysis → Smart Router
Orchestrator guidance → Response Synthesizer
Smart Router memoryHints → Memory Router (needsMemory, memoryTier, memoryQuery)
User message → Memory Router (fallback query)
Session ID → Session Context
Session ID → Conversation History
Conversation history → Context Builder
Cognitive mode → Context Builder
Cognitive mode → Memory Capture
Memory Router results → Search Interpreter (for relevance evaluation)
Conversation history → Context Builder
User message → Response Synthesizer
Context → Response Synthesizer
Response Synthesizer → Quality Scorer response (for quality evaluation before safety check)
Validated response → Response Refiner
Safety metadata → Response Refiner
Feedback Router response → Gateway data input
Feedback Router shouldContinueLoop → Gateway open (invertCondition=true, so gate opens when loop should exit)
Gateway output → Thinking Stripper (only when gate is open/loop exits)
Final output → Memory Capture (only after loop completes)
User message → Memory Capture
Gateway output → Stream Writer (only when gate is open/loop exits)
Refined response → Audit Logger
Persona data → Persona Formatter
Conversation history → Buffer Manager
Stripped response → Buffer Manager (no <think> blocks in buffer)
User message → Search Interpreter (for query context)
Search Interpreter relevantMemories → Context Builder memories
Search Interpreter fullResult → Context Builder searchInterpretation
User message → Quality Scorer (original query for relevance check)
Context Builder context → Quality Scorer memories (for grounding check)
Context Builder unknownSignal → Quality Scorer unknownSignal
Quality Scorer response passthrough → Safety Validator
Response Refiner output → Feedback Router
Quality Scorer qualityResult → Feedback Router qualityResult
Safety Validator safetyResult → Feedback Router safetyResult
Feedback Router feedbackContext → Orchestrator feedbackContext (BACK-EDGE for routing adjustments)
Feedback Router feedbackContext → Context Builder (BACK-EDGE for response refinement)
Context Builder → Response Synthesizer (persona for context)
